titleStmt.title: SII 8.701: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 701. (A.R. No. 386 of 1903). ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE IN THE CHOLESVARA TEMPLE AT MAHADANAPURAM, KULITTALAI TALUK, TRICHINOPOLY DISTRICT.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tirumaṉni viḷaṅka Irukuva
ṭaṉaiya tantoḷum vāḷum tuṇai
eṉa kaular vañcaṉai kaṭan tu vayi
rākarattu kuñcarakkuḻām palavāri Añcalil
cakkarakoṭṭattu tārāvaraiyanait tikkunikaḻa tiṟai
koṇṭaruḷi Arukkannutaiya catācaiciyalirukkum
kamalamaṉaiya nilamakaḷtanṉai muṉnir kuḷitta
vaṉṉāṉ tirumālātik keḻalāki Eṭuttana yā
tum caliyāvakaiyil Iṉiteṭutta taṉ kuṭai niḻalil
Inpuṟa virutti tikirtiyum puliyu n=ti caitoṟu naṭātti
pukaḻu n=ta rumamum puvitoṟu naṭātti viramu n=ti yākamu mānamum ka
ruṇaiyum tanṉurimai cuṟṟam piriyātu tarātala nikaḻa ja
yamu n=tā num viṟṟirun tu kulamaṇimakuṭam muṟaimaiyiṟ cū
ṭi tankaḻal tarātivar cuḻala ceṅkol nāvalam puvi
toṟum naṭāttiya kovirājakecaripanma rāṉa Uṭaiyār
śrīrājentra coḻatevarkku yāṇṭu nālā
vatu . cempaṅkuṭi kauśika n ma[ turā n=ta] kan virapāṇṭiya
nāna coḻabrahmama hārā jan In=ta śrīkayilāsa māṉa śrīma
turān=ta kaīśvara muṭaiyārkku Apimāṉajivavaḷanāṭṭu Āta
nūrnāṭṭu brahma teyam śrīcoḻakulamāṇikkacaturvve ti
maṅkalattu peruṅkuṟi sabhai yārpakkal nilam vilaiko
ṇṭu Iṟaiiḻiccuvittu kuṭutta nilamāvatu . Ivvūrp piṭākai
śrīkaṅkaikoṇṭacoḻavatikku kiḻakku śrīrājantra coḻavākkālu
kku teṟku munṟāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu nālām catirattu nilam nālumāvil
lukku vaṭakku nilam Iraṇṭumāvum tiṭalukku
teṟku nāvicarkku Anupokam viṭṭa nilam Arai
mā Araikkāṇik kiḻaraiyum nikki niṉṟa kaḷar ti
ṭal mākāṇi mun=ti rikai kiḻaraiyum Iṅke Añcā
ñ catura nila nālumāvil vaṭakkaṭaiya vempūr
pocan śrīmātavakra mavittan Uḷḷiṭṭārkku niṅku
m nilam Araimā Araikkāṇi mun=ti rikai kiḻ Aṟumāva
rai mun=ti rikaiyum tiṭalkku teṟku nāvicar
niṅkum nilam Araimā Araikkāṇi kiḻ mummāvaraiyum nir
naṭuvu kaḷar tiṭal nilam Irumā varai Araikkāṇi kiḻaraiyumā
ka taṭi Iraṇṭināl catiraniravi naṭuvupaṭṭa kaḷarnilam nālumāvum
Ivatikku kiḻakkum Erivāykku vaṭakku coḻabrahmamā rāyan vākkālukku teṟku ti
ruttāntoṉṟimāhātevar nilattukku kiḻakkum Erivāykku meṟku na
ṭuvupaṭṭa nilam Orumāvaraiyum Āka nilaṅ kāle Araikkālum
viṟṟukuṭuttu koṇṭa vilaipporuḷ kācu nālu Ikkācu nālum ko
ṇṭu Iṉṉilaṅ kāle Araimāvum viṟṟukkuṭuttom peruṅkuṟisabhai
yom . Innilam cantrā titavaṟ patinālā n=ta rattile tara(m)meṟṟu
m nilattāl Eppeṟpaṭṭa Iṟaiyum Iṟātitāka Iṟaikāval
koṇṭa kācu 6 Āka kācu pattu koṇṭu kalmel veṭṭuvittu kuṭu
ttom śrīmaturān=ta kaīśva ramuṭaiyārkku peruṅkuṟisabhai yom .
tirumaṅkalattu svā mi nan=ti yar paṇiyālu muṭamoci nārāyaṇakra ma
vittar paṇiyālum marutūr kaṇṇi tirumaḻapā yar paṇiyālum
kāñcai ka ma(kra) mavittar paṇiyālum ka naṟa veṇ
ṇayakra mavittar paṇiyālum tirupper viṣṇu can=ti racekarar paṇiyālum I
vūr madhyasta n koṟṟamaṅkalamuṭaiyān kotaṇṭan paṭṭan Eḻuttu . panmā
yeśvara rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 8.701 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
